news.headline: Clearside Biomedical (Nasdaq: CLSD) to report Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 27, 2025. Webcast/call at 4:30pm ET.
news.summary: Alpharetta-based Clearside Biomedical, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSD) revealed that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entirety of 2024 on Thursday, March 27, 2025, shortly after the markets close. Their innovative approach to delivering treatments to the back of the eye via the suprachoroidal space (SCS®) has been making waves. Following the release, there will be a webcast and conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day, where company executives will delve into the numbers and offer insights into the corporate landscape.

news.headline: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. reported 2024 net income of $5,591,000, a 2.1% increase from 2023.
news.summary: In Great Neck, N.Y., on March 12, 2025, Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (Nasdaq: LOAN) reported a net income of around $5,591,000 for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, translating to $0.49 per share based on roughly 11.4 million weighted-average outstanding common shares. This marks a slight uptick from the previous year's net income of approximately $5,476,000, or $0.48 per share based on around 11.5 million weighted-average outstanding common shares. The increase of $115,000, equating to 2.1%, can be mainly attributed to a decline in interest expense, offset in part by a decrease in origination fees.

news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) reported Q4 2024 results: Home closings up 28% to 836, revenue up 32% to $287.5M, net income $30M.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) announced its fourth quarter and full-year results for 2024. In Q4 2024, home closings rose by 28% to 836, generating a 32% increase in home closing revenue to $287.5 million. The home closing gross margin was 25.5%, slightly lower than the previous year's 26.7%. Net new home orders saw a 9% increase to 569. Pre-tax income for the quarter was $30.0 million, up from $29.7 million in Q4 2023. Earnings stood at $0.46 per diluted share.

news.headline: RC Mowers received Sourcewell contract for robotic mowing equipment, facilitating procurement for public agencies nationwide.
news.summary: A recent pre-bid deal has been reached to simplify the procurement process for public agencies across the country, allowing them to purchase budget-friendly, top-notch robotic mowing devices from the manufacturer based in Green Bay. The agreement, established in Green Bay, Wisconsin on March 12, 2025, aims to enhance efficiency in acquiring the high-performance equipment. This deal allows for the purchase of robotic mowers from RC Mowers, a prominent manufacturer in the industry.

news.headline: Solstice Gold Corp plans $850,000 private placement financing, with board and management participation.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Solstice Gold Corp. (TSXV: SGC) has disclosed its plans to conduct a funding round through a non-brokered private placement, aiming to raise $850,000 in total. The Board of Directors and Senior Management are set to contribute significantly to this Offering. The financing will involve the issuance of premium flow-through common shares.

news.headline: US crypto users missed out on $2.6 billion in airdrops due to geoblocking policies, impacting earnings from 2020-2024.
news.summary: A recent report by a cryptocurrency-focused venture capital firm indicated that geoblocking policies implemented in cryptocurrency airdrops could have caused Americans to lose out on potential earnings amounting to $2.6 billion between 2020 and 2024. The report highlighted that out of the 12 airdrops analyzed, 11 utilized geoblockers to restrict U.S. residents from participating or receiving tokens. Airdrops involve sending free tokens to users as a marketing tactic to boost project visibility. The restrictions imposed on U.S. users could have led to missed opportunities ranging from $1.84 billion to an undisclosed amount. This report sheds light on the financial implications of geoblocking practices in the cryptocurrency industry.

news.headline: Open-Source AI Foundation launches 20% Project using Agentic AI for criminal justice reform. AUSTIN, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 12, 2025, The Open-Source AI Foundation (O-SAIF) unveiled The 20% Project, a pioneering endeavor that utilizes open-source Agentic AI to revolutionize case review processes in the criminal justice system. This initiative aims to enhance efficiency and accuracy in legal procedures by harnessing the power of AI technology.

news.headline: RedHill Biopharma progresses in Crohn's disease program with Phase 2 study of RHB-2041 for MAP-positive CD patients, focusing on mucosal healing and infection eradication.
news.summary: The upcoming Phase 2 trial for RHB-2041 is set to be groundbreaking as it will be the first clinical study focusing on Crohn's Disease (CD) patients who are all confirmed to be MAP-positive. The study aims to establish a correlation between mucosal healing and the eradication of MAP2 infection by introducing unique endpoints and advanced imaging techniques. Discussions for Type C approval are underway to pave the way for this innovative study.

news.headline: Catalina Snacks names Elias Aoukar as Chief Supply Chain Officer for operational boost amid rapid growth.
news.summary: Elias Aoukar has been appointed as the Chief Supply Chain Officer for Catalina Snacks, a prominent player in the better-for-you Snacks and Cereals sector. With a proven track record in scaling operations and enhancing efficiency for rapidly expanding brands, Aoukar is set to bring his expertise to the company. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, in Indianapolis. This move aims to bolster Catalina Snacks' operations and drive growth in the competitive market landscape.

news.headline: Unilever Food Solutions reveals 4 key food trends for 2025, including the rise of Asian flavors in the global market.
news.summary: In Rotterdam, Netherlands and London on March 12, 2025, Unilever Food Solutions (UFS) announced the launch of its third annual Future Menus report, focusing on four primary food service trends for the year. The latest research indicates a shift towards Asian flavors supplanting traditional European culinary styles. This initiative aims to keep up with the evolving preferences with in-depth analysis showcasing this transition.

news.headline: TrueBlue selected among 2025 World's Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere for ethical practices and compliance. #TBI
news.summary: TrueBlue, a prominent supplier of specialized workforce solutions, has been acknowledged by Ethisphere for its exemplary ethical business practices, compliance, and governance programs. This recognition underscores TrueBlue's leadership in maintaining high standards. As of March 12, 2025, TrueBlue, traded on NYSE under the symbol TBI, continues to demonstrate its commitment to ethical operations and responsible governance.

news.headline: Private markets show short-term concerns but strong long-term fundamentals, highlighted in 2025 Hamilton Lane report. Growth potential in evergreen.
news.summary: A recent study has identified certain worrisome trends in private markets in the near future, but remains optimistic about the overall long-term prospects. The report emphasizes the significant potential for growth in the evergreen sector. The research, conducted by Hamilton Lane (Nasdaq: HLNE) and released on March 12, 2025, indicates potential challenges in the short term while highlighting positive fundamentals for sustained growth.

news.headline: 1,000+ high school students honored for excelling in college courses from top universities by National Education Equity Lab.
news.summary: The Honor Society by the National Education Equity Lab recognizes exceptional student accomplishments in college credit courses from top institutions, showcasing academic excellence in low-income high schools nationwide. Taking place in New York on March 12, 2025, this initiative aims to highlight the talent of students in underprivileged communities.

news.headline: 111, Inc. (NASDAQ: YI) to engage in Fireside Chat with Water Tower Research on March 26, 2025 in Shanghai.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Shanghai, 111, Inc. (NASDAQ: YI), a prominent tech-enabled healthcare platform company, declared its dedication to revolutionizing the healthcare industry in China by digitally empowering both the upstream and downstream sectors. The company aims to reshape the healthcare value chain.

news.headline: Braindate launches new platform update promoting continuous learning and connection; aims to keep communities engaged throughout the year.
news.summary: A recent update to the platform has been introduced to ensure that communities remain engaged year-round, promoting enhanced learning and connections. Braindate, a prominent event technology platform facilitating knowledge sharing and professional networking, is dedicated to fostering deeper relationships among users. This latest update is a significant step forward in fulfilling this mission, aiming to provide a more enriching experience for its users. The platform, based in Montreal, announced the update on March 12, 2025, signaling its commitment to supporting continued engagement and learning opportunities.

news.headline: Integral Consulting Inc. and ScitoVation, LLC form alliance to enhance health risk assessment, leveraging data analysis.
news.summary: A collaborative partnership has been formed between Integral Consulting Inc. and ScitoVation, LLC, with the goal of revolutionizing health risk assessment. This alliance, announced on March 12, 2025, seeks to combine their respective scientific knowledge and utilize cutting-edge data analysis techniques. The strategic collaboration aims to enhance the accuracy and effectiveness of health risk assessment methods.

news.headline: Capital Group introduces eight active ETF model portfolios, expanding their suite of active ETFs. LOS ANGELES, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Capital Group, a leading active investment manager, has launched eight new active model portfolios, adding to its suite of active ETFs which are the fastest growing in the market. This launch comes as part of Capital's strategy to expand its offerings. The company's suite of active ETFs has reached a total of [insert number] options. This expansion signifies Capital Group's continued commitment to providing a diverse range of investment opportunities for its clients. The launch occurred on March 12, 2025, in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Storyful launches Headstart: affordable intel for agencies. New service provides concise insights to win pitches. AoP: March 12, 2025
news.summary: A recently launched service is providing valuable insights to help agencies secure pitches without the need for substantial research budgets. Storyful Intelligence, a top research and strategy firm, has unveiled Headstart, a rapid and efficient research solution. This service aims to aid agencies in winning pitches by offering quick and impactful research support. The announcement was made in New York on March 12, 2025. With Headstart, agencies can access the necessary information to boost their pitch success rates without significant financial investment.

news.headline: Stretch Zone opens new location in Saint Johns, FL on Mar 12, 2025, offering patented tables for assisted stretching.
news.summary: The leading assisted stretching franchise, Stretch Zone, has recently opened its latest location in SAINT JOHNS, Fla., on March 12, 2025. Known for its innovative patented strapping system on exclusive tables, the brand continues to expand its reach.

news.headline: Life Time expands access to LTH-branded supplements on Amazon, offering rigorously tested protein powders, electrolytes, fish oil. #LTH #Amazon
news.summary: Recently, Life Time, a leading healthy lifestyle brand based in CHANHASSEN, Minnesota, has broadened the availability of their rigorously tested products. These include LTH protein powders, electrolytes, fish oil, and more. The company announced this move on March 12, 2025. Life Time is publicly traded under the ticker symbol NYSE: LTH. Their product line is backed by research and is known for its high quality and reliability.

news.headline: iRobot appoints Neal P. Goldman to board of directors, expanding size to nine. Goldman brings financial expertise.
news.summary: iRobot Corp. (NASDAQ: IRBT), a prominent consumer robotics company, recently appointed Neal P. Goldman to its board of directors. The addition of Goldman brings the total number of board members to nine. Known for his successful oversight of operational and financial transformations, Goldman is expected to contribute valuable expertise to the company. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, in Bedford, Massachusetts. Goldman's proven track record indicates a promising future for iRobot Corp.

news.headline: ZIM reported impressive full year 2024 results, with revenues of $8.43B, net income of $2.15B, and achieved 14% volume growth. For 2025, they expect Adjusted EBITDA between $1.6B - $2.2B and Adjusted EBIT between $350M - $950M. CEO noted strong financial results and fleet transformation driving market share gains. Conference call at 8:00 AM ET to review results. Annual Report available on ZIM website. Focused on ESG values and innovative seaborne transportation services.
news.summary: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd. reported robust financial results for 2024 with full-year revenues of $8.43 billion, net income of $2.15 billion, Adjusted EBITDA of $3.69 billion, and Adjusted EBIT of $2.55 billion. The company saw a 14% volume growth, reaching 982 thousand TEUs in Q4 2024. ZIM's performance included generated margins of 26% for net income, 44% for Adjusted EBITDA, and 30% for Adjusted EBIT. A Q4 2024 dividend of $382 million was declared, representing 45% of the full year net income. The 2025 outlook predicts Adjusted EBITDA within $1.6-2.2 billion and Adjusted EBIT $350 million to $950 million. Net debt decreased to $2.88 billion, with a net leverage ratio of 0.8x by the end of 2024.CEO Eli Glickman highlighted the exceptional profitability and record carried volume achieved in 2024. The company's fleet transformation resulted in strong financial results and market share gains. The liquidity, cash flows, and capital allocation were well managed. ZIM projects a resilient business for 2025 despite industry volatility. The Annual Report on Form 20-F is available for further details on the company's performance. ZIM, established in 1945 Israel, is a leading global container liner shipping company.

news.headline: Iridium partners with World Central Kitchen for global relief efforts on March 12, 2025. #IRDM
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Iridium Communications Inc., a prominent company in global voice and data satellite communications listed on Nasdaq as IRDM, revealed a significant collaboration with World Central Kitchen (WCK). The partnership aims to support WCK in its mission to offer aid in times of need.

news.headline: Amarin reports 4Q 2024 revenue of $62.3M, expenses at $43.0M, and a year-end cash position of $294.2M. Ratio change announced for Nasdaq listing maintenance. Company emphasizes strategic focus and global growth momentum of VASCEPA franchise. Jumps in net revenue from European markets, as in Italy and China. In 2024, 45 publications on VASCEPA benefits were presented, showing its cardiovascular benefits. 4Q 2024 Financials: Revenue -17% at $62.3M; U.S. $44.2M, Europe $4.0M, RoW $11.9M. Non-GAAP net loss for 4Q was $8.7M. Amarin aims to maximize VASCEPA reach and capital.
news.summary: Amarin Corporation plc reported total revenues of $62.3 million and operating expenses of $43.0 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, with a year-end cash position of $294.2 million. Despite facing challenges like generic market competition in the U.S., the company generated over $200 million in revenue in 2024 and maintained a strong cash balance with no debt. The focus on strategic initiatives, operational efficiency, and global expansion of the VASCEPA/VAZKEPA franchise contributed to the financial performance. A 1-for-20 ADS ratio change was announced to maintain Nasdaq listing. The company continues to advance commercialization efforts in Europe and global markets, while investing in R&D to demonstrate the benefits of VASCEPA/VAZKEPA. Financially, there was a decrease in net revenue compared to the same period in 2023, attributed to lower selling prices and volume. The company reaffirms its commitment to maximizing revenue streams, managing expenses, and expanding market reach to support ongoing operations.

news.headline: iRobot announced financial results in Q4 2024: Revenue was $172.0M (down from $307.5M in Q4 2023), operating loss was $61.0M. Total headcount reduced by 51% to 541. The company canceled its 2024 results conference call. Strategic review ongoing. For more info, visit www.iRobot.com.
news.summary: iRobot Corp reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 28, 2024. The company's CEO, Gary Cohen, highlighted the success of their iRobot Elevate strategy, indicating reduced operating losses, improved gross margins, and optimized cash flow. They also announced the largest product launch in company history, aiming for margin-accretive products to support revenue growth in 2025. Key financial numbers from Q4 2024 include a revenue of $172.0 million and notable reductions in operating expenses. Full-year 2024 figures include $681.8 million in revenue and a GAAP gross margin of 20.9%, impacted by non-recurring charges related to product development transition. The company reduced its headcount by 51% and initiated a strategic review to explore alternatives like refinancing debt or a potential sale. The company's financial statements express concerns about its ability to continue as a going concern due to uncertainties in consumer demand, competition, and other factors. The article also mentions the cancellation of the conference call and engagement with financial advisors for the strategic review.

news.headline: Cresco Labs reports record cash flow in 2024, driven by disciplined strategy.
news.summary: Chicago-based cannabis company, Cresco Labs, announced their strong financial performance for 2024. The company reported a record cash flow, attributing it to their disciplined business strategy. This success reflects in their impressive numbers, with revenue reaching [insert number] and profits soaring to [insert number]. Cresco Labs' focus on strategic decision-making has evidently paid off, setting a positive trajectory for the company's future growth and success in the industry.

news.headline: VEON to reveal financial results for Q4 2024 on 20 March 2025, with conference call at 16:00 GST (8:00 EST). Visit link to register.
news.summary: VEON Ltd. (NASDAQ:VEON) will release its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year ended 31 December 2024 on 20 March 2025, at approximately 10:00 GST. The results conference call with senior management will take place at 16:00 GST on the same day. To access the event, registration is required through the provided link. Participants will receive confirmation via email with webcast access and dial-in details for the conference call. It is encouraged to watch the event through the webcast link. If participating in the Q&A session, attendees should select 'Yes' for live questions during the call. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII) to attend Roth Capital Partners Conference on March 17-18, 2025 at Laguna Cliffs Marriott Resort, Dana Point, California.
news.summary: Elkhart, Indiana-based LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII), a prominent supplier of engineered components for the recreation and transportation sectors, will be present at the 37th Annual Roth Conference happening on March 17-18, 2025. LCI Industries is scheduled to take part in a fireside chat and conduct individual meetings with institutional investors and analysts during the event, which is set to be held at the Laguna Cliffs Marriott Resort & Spa in Dana Point, California. For additional information, please reach out to Roth Capital Partn.

news.headline: Solo Brands, Inc. (NYSE: DTC) reports Q4 and FY 2024 results, including brands like Solo Stove and Chubbies.
news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas, Solo Brands, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the three months and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as DTC, is a prominent collection of lifestyle brands such as Solo Stove, Chubbies, Isle, and Oru, all revolutionizing outdoor and apparel sectors. John Larson, the Interim President and Chief Executive Officer, stated that during the fourth quarter, the Board and management strategized an assertive transformation.

news.headline: Cargobull improves TRU efficiency with new upgrades, includes microchannel condenser to enhance performance of 625 and 655MT Hybrid TRUs.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, Utility Trailer and Cargobull North America have unveiled advancements in their low-emission transport refrigeration units (TRUs). The latest innovations include a newly developed TRU featuring a microchannel condenser, along with the introduction of the Load-Dividing Bulkhead as an additional option. These upgrades are aimed at improving efficiency, increasing output, and enhancing the performance of the 625 and 655MT Hybrid TRUs. These units are known for their environmentally friendly design, meeting stringent emission standards.

news.headline: HEINZ introduces limited-edition Chip Dip, featuring same ketchup in wide-mouth jar, for National Potato Chip Day on March 14.
news.summary: PITTSBURGH & CHICAGO--A new limited-edition product called HEINZ Chip Dip is being introduced by the brand to pair its ketchup with potato chips. The offering features the familiar ketchup flavor in a wide-mouth jar designed for potato chip dipping. HEINZ aims to bridge the gap between its iconic ketchup and potato chips, traditionally enjoyed separately. The product is set to launch in time for National Potato Chip Day on March 14 and will be available for a limited time.

news.headline: United Natural Foods (NYSE: UNFI) to join 37th Roth Conference. CFO Tarditi to chat on March 17, 2025, at 8:30 am PT. Investors to use webcast link on UNFI's website.
news.summary: United Natural Foods, Inc. (NYSE: UNFI) is set to engage in Roth’s 37th Annual Conference next week in Providence, R.I. Matteo Tarditi, the President and Chief Financial Officer, will participate in a fireside chat starting at 8:30 am Pacific Time on March 17, 2025. Those interested can access the live audio webcast through a link on the investor relations section of the Company’s website at www.unfi.com under the “Events” tab. UNFI is recognized as North America's leading grocery provider.

news.headline: Pipedrive unveils AI-powered report creation for sales insights; generated by OpenAI, simplifying data analysis for users.
news.summary: Pipedrive, a popular sales CRM for small businesses, unveiled a new AI-powered report creation tool in New York. This feature simplifies data analysis for sales teams with just a click. Using OpenAI's generative AI tech, users can now generate custom reports by responding to natural language prompts. This enhancement aims to facilitate easier data-driven decision-making for improved sales outcomes.

news.headline: PharmaCord and Mercalis merge to create top biopharmaceutical solutions provider, aiming to meet industry needs.
news.summary: PharmaCord LLC, a renowned patient services provider for the biopharmaceutical sector based in Jeffersonville, Indiana, and Mercalis, an integrated life sciences commercialization partner in Morrisville, North Carolina, have recently merged. This merger aims to establish one of the top independent total solutions providers in the biopharmaceutical industry. The combined entity will offer comprehensive solutions across the healthcare value chain, becoming a highly trusted industry giant. This merger will lead to the formation of a company with a significant market presence and extensive capabilities.

news.headline: Guaranty Income, provider of fixed indexed annuities, launches new website gilico.com for enhanced digital experience.
news.summary: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, Guaranty Income Life Insurance Company (Guaranty Income), a prominent fixed indexed annuities provider, has launched an upgraded gilico.com website to enhance services for clients and financial experts. Established in 1926, Guaranty Income is well-known for its financial stability, reliability, and provision of secure retirement options. The updated website features a modern design and improved functionality, showcasing the company's dedication to innovation.

news.headline: InTandem Capital invests in Clinilabs, a global CRO specializing in CNS drug development. No specific numbers provided.
news.summary: In New York, InTandem Capital Partners, a private equity firm specializing in healthcare services, has revealed a new partnership. This collaboration involves the founder and management team of Clinilabs, a global full-service contract research organization (CRO). Clinilabs is focused on offering a comprehensive array of services for the development of central nervous system (CNS) drugs and devices to various industries including pharmaceuticals, biotechnology, and medical technology. The partnership marks a significant move for InTandem Capital in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Intelsat and Cochise County Sheriff's Office collaborate on satellite communication system for border security, aiding in extreme, remote environments.
news.summary: Intelsat, a leading satellite and terrestrial networks operator, has collaborated with the Cochise County, Arizona Sheriff’s Office to introduce Intelsat’s Multi-Layer Communication System (MLCS). This system aims to enhance border security operations in challenging and isolated terrains lacking conventional communication services. The initiative focuses on enabling security forces to maintain secure and efficient communication channels. The deployment underscores Intelsat's dedication to delivering cutting-edge satellite technology for law enforcement purposes.

news.headline: US MBA 30-Yr Mortgage Rate Actual 6.67% (Forecast -, Previous 6.73%)
Accelsius launches NeuGuard support program for data center liquid cooling, ensures reliability for AI systems.
news.summary: Accelsius™, a Texas-based company specializing in innovative two-phase, direct-to-chip liquid cooling technology, has introduced NeuGuard, a new support program aimed at ensuring top-notch cooling reliability in the age of advanced computing and AI. This program offers data center operators a sense of security when dealing with the demands of cooling cutting-edge AI and high-performance computing systems. NeuGuard is now accessible and is structured on the core values of Accelsius™.

news.headline: Tecnoglass declares $0.15 per share dividend for Q1 2025, $0.60 annually; Payment on April 30, 2025.
news.summary: In Miami FL, on March 12, 2025, Tecnoglass, Inc. (NYSE: TGLS), a top producer of premium aluminum, vinyl windows, and architectural glass worldwide for residential and commercial markets, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share, totaling $0.60 annually, for Q1 2025. Shareholders recorded by March 31, 2025, will receive $0.15 dividend on April 30, 2025.

news.headline: Guardsquare offers free mobile app scans at SecureWorld Boston on March 12-13, 2025 at Booth #670 for improved protection.
news.summary: Guardsquare will be showcasing their latest in mobile app protection at SecureWorld Boston on March 12-13, 2025. Attendees can visit Booth #670 to learn more about their products and services.

news.headline: Mag Mile Capital secures $13M in CMBS financing for Hampton Inn Harker Heights in Texas.
news.summary: In Chicago, Illinois, on March 12, 2025, Mag Mile Capital, Inc. (OTCQB: MMCP) celebrated closing a CMBS financing deal worth $13 million for the Hampton Inn Harker Heights. This premium select-service hotel is situated in Harker Heights, Texas.

news.headline: Santech Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: STEC) regains NASDAQ compliance with minimum bid price. NASDAQ confirms compliance.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on March 12, 2025, Santech Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: STEC) disclosed its compliance with NASDAQ's minimum bid price requirement (under Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) after receiving a notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The company has resolved the issue and NASDAQ has confirmed the closure of this matter.

news.headline: PLBY Group CEO Ben Kohn to speak at 37th Roth Conference on March 17-18 in California. - 130 characters
news.summary: PLBY Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLBY), the company behind the globally renowned Playboy brand, disclosed that its CEO, Ben Kohn, will engage in a fireside conversation at the upcoming 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17-18 in Dana Point, California. The event offers a platform for industry leaders to share insights, with Kohn representing the iconic company.

news.headline: InspireMD's 2024 financial results released. Investor call on March 12th at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: The management will be hosting an investor conference call today at 8:30am ET on March 12th.

news.headline: Amarin reports Q4 2024 revenue of $62.3M, expenses of $43.0M, and $294.2M cash position, reflecting company's strategic growth.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company recorded total revenues of $62.3 million and operating expenses amounting to $43.0 million. As of year-end 2024, the company maintained a robust cash position of $294.2 million. The performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 showcases the positive outcomes of the company's strategic focus, operational streamlining, prudent cash management practices, and the increasing global momentum of the VASCEPA®/VAZKEPA® (icosapent ethyl) franchise.

news.headline: Class 1 Nickel starts geophysical survey at River Valley PGE Project in Sudbury, Ontario. Covers 2,916 ha with PGE-bearing mineralization.
news.summary: A company known as Class 1 Nickel and Technologies Limited (CSE: NICO | OTCQB: NICLF) has recently partnered with Geotech Ltd to conduct a helicopter-borne VTEM™ Plus time-domain electromagnetic and horizontal magnetic-gradiometric survey over its River Valley PGE Project in Ontario, Canada. The RV Project spans approximately 2,916 hectares and includes several kilometers of promising geology with known PGE-bearing sulphide mineralization. This mineralization is classified as Contact-Style PGE-Cu-Ni hosted by the River Valley Intrusion. The project is situated about 65 kilometers northeast of Sudbury, Ontario.

news.headline: Capital City Bank opens new office in Panama City Beach at 8403 West Bay Parkway. Ribbon cutting held on March 11, 2025.
news.summary: Yesterday, on March 11, 2025, Capital City Bank celebrated the inauguration of its new banking office at 8403 West Bay Parkway in Panama City Beach, Florida. The location is at the entrance of the Latitude Margaritaville Watersound community. The ribbon-cutting event was attended by officials from Capital City Bank, The St. Joe Company, and representatives from the Panama City Beach Chamber of Commerce and the Bay County Chamber of Commerce.

news.headline: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance (NASDAQ: REFI) released Q4 2024 financial results on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NASDAQ: REFI), a commercial mortgage real estate investment trust, disclosed its performance for Q4 and the full year of 2024. The Company shared its financial results for the period ending December 31, 2024, marking a significant milestone in its operations.

news.headline: Upstream Bio finishes Phase 2 enrollment trial for verekitug in chronic rhinosinusitis patients, data expected in H2 2025.
news.summary: The Phase 2 clinical trial of verekitug in individuals suffering from chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps has successfully enrolled all participants. The top-line results of this trial are anticipated to be disclosed in the latter part of 2025.
